channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Intel vs Dell Stock 2026: Which Tech Giant Is the Better Buy Right Now?
item.description: In 2026, Dell and Intel present contrasting investment opportunities, with Dell's AI server growth and Intel's semiconductor recovery. Analysts favour Dell for near-term momentum, while Intel offers higher risk and reward. [Intel, Dell Technologies, ServiceNow]

item.title: Meta vs Google Stock 2026: Which Tech Titan Is the Better Buy in AI Era?
item.description: Meta and Alphabet are investing heavily in AI, with Meta focusing on ad-driven growth and Alphabet on cloud expansion. Analysts see distinct growth paths for these tech giants in 2026. [Alphabet, Meta]

item.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
item.description: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed. [Meta]

item.title: Fed’s Williams Quips Economist Jobs Are Safe as AI Shift Unfolds
item.description: The implications of artificial intelligence gripped global central bankers in Iceland this week, with one Federal Reserve official joking that it won’t put economists out of business. [Intel]

item.title: Foxconn approves record $0.22 per share cash dividend for 2025
item.description: According to Liu, Hon Hai invests more than NTUSD 100 billion (USD 3.05 billion) a year in research and development, which accounts for 1.5 per cent to 2 per cent of the company's annual revenue

item.title: Hut 8 Stock 2026: Buy or Sell as AI Data Center Pivot Accelerates?
item.description: Hut 8 Corp. has transitioned from Bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure, boosting its stock and attracting investor interest with strong revenue growth and strategic contracts.

item.title: Tower Semiconductor Stock 2026: Buy or Sell on Strong AI Photonics Momentum?
item.description: Tower Semiconductor is thriving in 2026, driven by demand for its silicon photonics in AI data centers. Strong financials and strategic positioning highlight its growth potential despite industry risks.

item.title: Goldman Sachs predicts capacitor stocks will surge as AI data centers devour components
item.description: AI-driven demand for capacitors could extend industry growth cycles, impacting global supply chains and investment strategies significantly. The post Goldman Sachs predicts capacitor stocks will surge as AI data centers devour components appeared first on Cry…

item.title: I worked with Steve Jobs at Apple, where every OS update killed startups. AI founders are about to face the same thing
item.description: Mill CEO and Nest co-founder Matt Rogers watched Apple render startups obsolete overnight. He says the same dynamic is playing out in AI — and the survival playbook looks familiar. [Apple]

item.title: Apple vs Nvidia 2026: Which Stock Is the Smarter Buy Amid AI Boom?
item.description: In 2026, investors face a choice between Nvidia's AI-driven growth and Apple's stable returns. Analysts favour Nvidia for higher potential, while Apple offers reliability amidst market uncertainties. [Nvidia, Apple]

item.title: Mastercard stock has climbed nearly 12,000% since its IPO in 2006 — and the company says cards are just the beginning
item.description: A $10,000 bet on Mastercard's 2006 IPO would be worth nearly $1.2 million today.

item.title: SanDisk vs Micron Stock 2026: Which AI Memory Play Offers Better Value?
item.description: Investors must choose between SanDisk and Micron for exposure to the AI memory boom in 2026, considering differing business models, valuations, and risk profiles amid surging data center demand.
